zh.Blankney, Lincolnshire, England: 英國林可爾史爾布藍可尼
zh.Park Hall, Morton, Derbyshire, England: 英國英格蘭德比夏爾莫頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger  III Deincourt of Knapthorp於大約1203年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾莫頓時，他的父親Roger Deyncourt33歲，母親Annora Deincourt21歲。他於大約1254年與Joana Thorpe在英國英格蘭德比夏爾莫頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1268年享年67歲。

zh-hans.Blankney, Lincolnshire, England: 英国林可爾史爾布藍可尼
zh-hans.Park Hall, Morton, Derbyshire, England: 英国英格兰德比夏爾莫頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger  III Deincourt of Knapthorp于大约1203年出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾莫頓时，他的父亲Roger Deyncourt33岁，母亲Annora Deincourt21岁。他于大约1254年与Joana Thorpe在英国英格兰德比夏爾莫頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1268年享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger  III Deincourt of Knapthorp was born about 1203, in Morton, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Roger Deyncourt, was 33 and his mother, Annora Deincourt, was 21. He married Joana Thorpe about 1254, in Morton, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died about 1268, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger  III Deincourt of Knapthorp est né environ 1203, à Morton, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger Deyncourt, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Annora Deincourt, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Joana Thorpe environ 1254, à Morton, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé environ 1268, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger  III Deincourt of Knapthorp um 1203 in Morton, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Deyncourt 33 und seine Mutter Annora Deincourt 21. Er hat um 1254 in Morton, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Joana Thorpe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb um 1268 im Alter von 67 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger  III Deincourt of Knapthorp è nato il circa 1203 nel Morton, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Roger Deyncourt, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Annora Deincourt, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Joana Thorpe circa 1254, nel Morton, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì circa 1268, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.Blankney, Lincolnshire, England: イギリスリンコルンシュアイアブランクニー
ja.Park Hall, Morton, Derbyshire, England: イギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアモートン
ja.lifeSummary: Roger  III Deincourt of Knapthorpが約1203年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアモートンで生まれた時，父Roger Deyncourtは33歳，母Annora Deincourtは21歳であった。約1254年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアモートンでJoana Thorpeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は約1268年に67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger  III Deincourt of Knapthorp(이)가 대략 1203년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 모르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Deyncourt(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Annora Deincourt(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1254년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 모르턴에서 Joana Thorpe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1268년 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger  III Deincourt of Knapthorp nasceu aproximadamente 1203, em Morton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Roger Deyncourt, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Annora Deincourt, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Joana Thorpe aproximadamente 1254, em Morton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1268, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger  III Deincourt of Knapthorp родился около 1203 г. в местности мортон, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Roger Deyncourt было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Annora Deincourt, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Joana Thorpe около 1254 г. в местности мортон, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер около 1268 г. в возрасте 67 лет.

sm.about 1203–about 1268: e tusa o le 1203–e tusa o le 1268

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger  III Deincourt of Knapthorp nació aproximadamente 1203, en Morton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Roger Deyncourt, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Annora Deincourt, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Joana Thorpe aproximadamente 1254, en Morton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1268, a la edad de 67 años.
